security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws: https://thunderstore.io https://api.nexusmods.com https://users.nexusmods.com; img-src 'self' https: data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'

bundle.longDescription: Tidekeeper is an open-source mod manager for Subnautica 2, supporting UE4SS script mods and PAK mods with Nexus Mods integration.
